title: Does Installing Your Own Renewable Energy System Make Sense?
summary: It’s very important to first check with AVEC to be sure whatever system you want to install will be allowed to be connected to the utility system (grid). With the high cost of fuel and energy in rural Alaska there are often vendors that want to sell renewable energy “solutions” to co-op members with the promise of quick pay back or huge savings. Here are some quick tips to help you figure out if instal...
